offer: For marketing agencies managing 5-15 campaigns/month, inefficient budget allocation causes suboptimal campaign performance. We provide performance analysis and budget suggestions instead of manual tracking and adjustments using spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient budget allocation leading to suboptimal campaign performance
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for marketing agencies
